name: Autolite (India) Limited
summary: Autolite (India) Limited manufactures and sells automotive head lamps and halogen bulbs in India. It also provides work lamps, LED lamps, fog lamps, turn signal lamps, incandescent bulbs, and miniature bulbs; and auxiliary, agricultural equipment, rubber housing, rubber body work and spot, and round driving lamps, as well as machines, dies, and molds. In addition, the company manufactures electric vehicles, lithium ion battery packs, and solar products; wiring harness, rubber components, and sheet metal components; and paint and adhesives. The company serves original equipment manufacturers, as well as the replacement market. It also exports its products to approximately 55 countries, including the United States, Peru, Columbia, Egypt, South Africa, Iran, Saudi Arabia, Poland, Turkey, etc. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Jaipur, India.
